major_changes: Added dedicated MindSpiderEntity with TC4 harmless/viewer/lifespan NBT contract
GenPassage feature 14 now spawns thaumcraft:mind_spider instead of vanilla cave_spider
Added EldritchCap/Lock/Trap/Crystal block entities and registered their block entity types
EldritchLock now delays 100 ticks and advances a saved BossMapData-equivalent cycle
EldritchTrap now ticks on 10+rand(25), zaps players in range 3, deals magic damage and applies temporary warp
Mapped blockEldritch meta 9 to real eldritch_crab_spawner
Expanded Guardian/Warden/Golem baked model part tree
Fixed Stage220 crab spawner particle coordinate typo
known_limitations: Cultist portal and taintacle giant boss-room variants are still equivalent placeholders and should become dedicated entities in Stage283-292
MindSpider renderer is currently a small block-mob renderer bridge; replace with a spider model renderer next
Gradle build could not be fully run in the sandbox because the wrapper needs internet access
